name: Rohan Ramakrishnan

find.name: Jefray Ding
find.why: You should meet Jefray Ding because his insights into indie game dev could spark some exciting ideas for your own projects.

find.name: Rory An
find.why: You should meet Rory An because both of you share a passion for creativity and can inspire each other to bring new ideas to life.
find.match_belief: Building is thinking out loud. Code and play are the only honest conversation between intention and truth.

profile.belief: Ship it broken. Each player teaches you what matters. Polish follows understanding, never precedes it.
profile.working_on: roguelike where you inherit and operate your grandmother's tea shop through economic seasons and failure

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to embrace the messy learning process, valuing player experiences as essential lessons in your creative journey.
